<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head>
    <title>The Qubit Game</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Build a quantum computer, one qubit at a time.">
    <link rel="icon" href="https://cl-quantum-game.appspot.com/favicon/favicon.ico">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <meta name="theme-color" content="???">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://cl-quantum-game.appspot.com/banner.png">
    <meta property="og:image:width" content="4000">
    <meta property="og:image:height" content="2250">
    <meta property="og:title" content="The Qubit Game">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Build a quantum computer, one qubit at a time.">
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://quantumai.google/education/thequbitgame">
    <style>
      iframe {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        right: 0;
        width: 100%;
        border: none;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        z-index: 999999;
        height: 100%;
      }

      html,
      body {
        overscroll-behavior: none;
      }
    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <iframe id="qubit-game" src="https://cl-quantum-game.appspot.com/"></iframe>
  

</body></html>
